# bufferCount

**Instance Property**

The count of buffers in the queue.

## Declaration

```swift
var bufferCount: CMItemCount { get }
```

## Inspecting a Queue

- **isEmpty**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the queue contains buffers.
- **head**: The element at the head of the queue.
- **containsEndOfData**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the buffer has its end-of-data state set.
- **isAtEndOfData**: A Boolean value that indicates whether that queue is at the end of its data.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether the queue contains buffers.
